description: Single-file PHP project with a planted undefined-class defect, licensed (bridge network + QODANA_LICENSE_ONLY_TOKEN via passEnv). First e2e for the PHP image (DHI php language base: PHP pre-baked, plus the layered node toolchain + in-place global eslint pin for JS/TS support, plus the composer toolchain). Proves qodana-php builds (base + node + eslint + composer + dist + cli + runtime), licenses as QDPHP, loads its Ultimate PhpStorm profile, and scans a real .php producing SARIF. Driver name + rule id are pinned from CI control run 27850910835 (observed driver QDPHP / Qodana for PHP; PhpUndefinedClassInspection fires in the default profile).

expectations.reason: The planted `new UndefinedHelperService()` references a class that is never defined or imported; PhpUndefinedClassInspection is enabled in the Ultimate PhpStorm profile and reports it. Pinned from CI control run 27850910835 (PhpUndefinedClassInspection observed firing under driver QDPHP).
